introSection: Renegade is a Great Coasters International wooden roller coaster located at Valleyfair in Shakopee, Minnesota, USA. Its layout is a combination of an out and back and twister. Opened on May 12, 2007, it is the newest major coaster at the park (Cosmic Coaster opened in 2011).

sections.title: History
sections.content: Renegade was announced on September 21, 2006. It opened on May 12, 2007.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Renegade's tall first drop twists in two directions - first to the right and then subsequently to the left. The ride also has a high speed station fly-past.

fullText:
Renegade is a Great Coasters International wooden roller coaster located at Valleyfair in Shakopee, Minnesota, USA. Its layout is a combination of an out and back and twister. Opened on May 12, 2007, it is the newest major coaster at the park (Cosmic Coaster opened in 2011).

Renegade was announced on September 21, 2006. It opened on May 12, 2007.

Renegade's tall first drop twists in two directions - first to the right and then subsequently to the left. The ride also has a high speed station fly-past.

Millennium Flyer trains.
